name: read_previous_letter
description: Open a previous letter from the conversation history in the reading view with text-to-speech. Use when the child wants to re-read or hear a previous letter from the animal (e.g. 'read the first letter', 'what did they say before', 'go back to their letter').

letter_index.description: The 1-based index of the animal's letter in the conversation history (e.g. 1 for the first response, 2 for the second). If unsure, use 1 for the most recent.
